title: rad player model
description: this resource packs turn basic skin into a Radok one that is modeled with armor support and leggings patch
body:
required: **[optifine](https://optifine.net/home) or [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) and [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)**

this pack makes _player model_ into the "**_Radok_** ";  
pack makes details about the creators skin into _3d_ and more

pack is compatible with **_animation_** packs when animation is pasted into the animation box

_armor support is added_
